_note: Live derived metrics — updated each agent session. This is the source of truth for data-derived estimates. Do not use dashboard.json for TDEE or rate-of-loss; use this file. When any value changes, update it here in the same session.

tdee.method: back-calculated from Phase 1 weight loss — 6-week check-in (25 May 2026)
tdee.derivation: 84.1 kg (Apr 20 week-2 start) → 80.6 kg (7d avg May 25), 35 days. actual_daily_deficit = (84.1−80.6) × 7700 ÷ 35 = 770 kcal/day. TDEE = 770 + 1,435 avg intake = 2,205. Rounded to 2,200.
tdee.previous_estimate_note: 10 May estimate (27 days, pending validation). Revised upward by ~125 kcal at 6-week check-in.
tdee.algorithm_note: Mifflin-St Jeor / formula. Data-derived estimate supersedes this.
tdee.dashboard_note: Left unchanged as conservative anchor; this file's estimate is used for planning.
tdee.cardio_free_note: Gym + dog walks only. Structured cardio (runs, rides, stairs) is logged separately and treated as additive to the weekly deficit.
tdee.phase2_maintenance_note: Revised from 2,100 to 2,200 following 6-week validation. Use 2,200 kcal/day base for Phase 2 maintenance month planning.

phase.name: Fat Loss — Bali
phase.live_target_note: Midpoint of 75–77 kg Bali range. 8 weeks from 80.4 kg at ~0.55 kg/wk.
phase.loss_rate_note: Phase 2 day 8 — glycogen flush likely complete. Rate TBD after week 2 settles.

vo2_max.note: Apple Watch estimate. +5.09 total gain since Apr export (85.8→79.0 kg). Passive (2,822÷79.0−32.89=+2.83) = 56%, fitness = 44%. Phase-end reading. Target: 40+ by Sep 2026.
